auth_notes: Authentication is typically handled via Basic Auth using the API Key as the username and API Secret as the password within the HTTP Request node.
rate_limits: 10 requests per second with bursts up to 20 requests.
gotchas: Sending faxes requires handling binary files (PDF/TIFF) which must be passed as multipart/form-data in the HTTP Request node.
Fax delivery is asynchronous; the API returns a success response when queued, not when delivered, necessitating webhook implementation for status tracking.
International dialing formats must be strictly followed (E.164) to avoid routing failures.
client_must_provide: Source document in supported format (PDF, DOCX, JPG)
research_notes: Implementation requires the HTTP Request node. To send a fax, the 'Send Binary Data' option must be enabled in n8n to upload the file to the provider's endpoint. For receiving faxes, a Webhook node must be configured to listen for Phaxio's POST callbacks.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Implementation requires the HTTP Request node. To send a fax, the 'Send Binary Data' option must be enabled in n8n to upload the file to the provider's endpoint. For receiving faxes, a Webhook node must be configured to listen for Phaxio's POST callbacks.
